name: Blitzkrieg Consistency
description: Adds forced-consistency and noclip-run challenges on top of Blitzkrieg.

default-noclip-attempts.name: Default noclip-run count
default-noclip-attempts.description: How many clean under-death-cap runs are needed by default for a new noclip challenge.

default-consistency-runs.name: Default consistency-run count
default-consistency-runs.description: How many clean (non-noclip) completions are needed by default for a new consistency challenge.
